title: festuca varia var. alpestris
intro: Festuca varia var. alpestris, also known as alpine fescue, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of alpine fescue include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Alpine fescue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal creams and ointments to promote skin health and reduce the appearance of scars and wounds.
